_publications._publicationTitle: Effect of Mind-Body Skills Training on Quality of Life for Geographically Diverse Adults With Neurofibromatosis: A Fully Remote Randomized Clinical Trial.

_contextSnippet: Participants in both the 3RP-NF and HEP-NF groups experienced improvement in the physical health QOL score (3RP-NF, 5.1; 95% CI, 3.2-7.0; P < .001; HEP-NF, 6.4; 95% CI, 4.6-8.3; P < .001)
resourceName: World Health Organization Quality of Life Brief Version (WHOQOL-BREF)
details: Physical health QOL improved significantly in both groups from baseline to after treatment (3RP-NF: 5.1 points, 95% CI 3.2-7.0, P<0.001; HEP-NF: 6.4 points, 95% CI 4.6-8.3, P<0.001)
